past_batch_b42_comparison.notes: B43 W5 V=2 (+2 vs B42) driven by s2/s4 reply-quality (events gate satisfied AND rubric met). s1/s7 still R (event gate fail). s6 same NF-W5-B42-1 unsafe-python recurrence — out of scope (issue #229, e2e-coder). s5 new misroute → mcp_install (observe-only).

nf_observations.summary: mcp_install skill declares unsafe-python step; --allow-unsafe-python not provided; skill_run_failed. Same shape as B42 W5 s6. Out-of-scope per task brief (e2e-coder territory, issue #229).

scenarios.reply_preview:
Skill is running in the background. Use `/tasks` to monitor progress.

The `mcp_install` skill encountered an error because it declared an unsafe Python step without the `--allow-unsafe-python` flag. To proceed, you need to re-run with this flag enabled.
